question: What phrase is written on the black sign visible in the background? A. The Pioneer Woman Cooks B. McCormick C. Your Opinion is not in the Recipe D. CAFE
How many jars are placed on the table in front of the large orange pumpkin?
What color is the beanie worn by the man with the beard? A. Red B. Yellow C. Black D. Orange
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with a beard and yellow beanie stands on the right wearing a black apron, while a woman in a black t-shirt with a lion graphic stands on the left. A large orange pumpkin sits on the table between them, with a spice jar and glass jar in front. The man gestures and holds the pumpkin while the woman stands still, with wooden cabinets and a microwave in the background.

question: How many people are visible?

A. only the skull decoration was shown B. only the man holding the pumpkin was shown C. both the skull decoration and the man holding the pumpkin were shown D. neither the skull decoration nor the man holding the pumpkin was shown

What action is the person performing in this segment? A. gesturing B. holding C. standing D. speaking
Describe the specific actions performed by the man wearing the yellow beanie and black apron involving the pumpkin throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the man in the yellow beanie gestures with his right hand while standing next to the woman in the black t-shirt; at 4s, he places his hand on his chest; at 8s, he gestures with both hands towards the pumpkin; at 12s, he holds the large orange pumpkin with both hands; at 16s, he keeps holding the pumpkin on the wooden cutting board.
